samples.text: All oaks are trees. All trees are plants. Are oaks plants?
Every member of oaks is among trees. Every member of trees is among plants. Does it follow that oaks are plants?
All oak trees are woody plants. All woody plants are plants. Are oak trees plants?
plants include all trees. trees include all oaks. Therefore, are oaks plants?
All oaks are trees. All trees are plants. The room temperature is 22 degrees Celsius. Are oaks plants?
